emails.subject: RE: Oasis Dairy Farms Judgement
emails.body: RE: Oasis Dairy Farms Judgement Kevin, Thanks for keeping up with this. Kim

emails.subject: FW: Oasis Dairy Farms Judgement
emails.body: Kevin, Who in legal have you been working with? Tracy was wondering when we thought we would receive the money. Thanks, Kim.

emails.subject: RE: Oasis Dairy Farms Judgement
emails.body: Bonnie White is the attorney. I have already called her to find out what our collection process is (if any). I know some guys named Guido and Mario who'll be happy to do it for 50% of the money. I'll let you know what I find out. kh
